/usr/bin/ar qc libhipnuc_sdk.a CMakeFiles/hipnuc_sdk.dir/src/canopen_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/hipnuc_sdk.dir/src/example_data.c.o CMakeFiles/hipnuc_sdk.dir/src/hipnuc_can_common.c.o CMakeFiles/hipnuc_sdk.dir/src/hipnuc_dec.c.o CMakeFiles/hipnuc_sdk.dir/src/hipnuc_j1939_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/hipnuc_sdk.dir/src/nmea_dec.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libhipnuc_sdk.a
